Who We Are

About Prime Central

Prime Central Air Conditioning Co. L.L.C is an electromechanical company based in Abu Dhabi, engaged in providing total quality solutions to the electro-mechanical and air conditioning field. We have been in the business since 2000 and have gained reputation and trust from our valuable satisfied customers and clients.

Prime undertakes various contracts for the design, supply and installation of air-conditioning and electro-mechanical systems for all commercial buildings, residential buildings, industrial warehouses, villas and marine works. We do the best and quality works as well as provide Annual Maintenance Contract (AMC).

Our management team comprises of the Managing Director who has been in the same field for over 35 years in various levels in the UAE, and has undertaken total project management responsibilities for highly reputed corporate and top-end individual clients. The team also includes Project Managers, Project Engineers, Administrators, Workshop Foremen, Site Supervisors and Skilled Technicians.

"PRIME people do PRIME Work for PRIME Clients"

Our Mission

To provide quality and cost-effective one-stop electro-mechanical solutions to clients in a timely and satisfactory manner.

Our Vision

To be one of the most trusted and wanted names in the field of electro-mechanical engineering across the UAE.

What We Do

Our Services

Comprehensive electro-mechanical solutions from design through to long-term maintenance.

❄️
HVAC Systems
Design, supply, installation and commissioning of all HVAC systems for commercial, residential and industrial buildings.
⚡
MEP Works
Complete Mechanical, Electrical and Plumbing solutions for all types of commercial and industrial projects.
🏢
Facilities Management
Integrated facilities management services ensuring smooth and efficient operations for your property.
📋
Annual Maintenance (AMC)
Annual Maintenance Contracts with 24/7 support covering preventive and corrective maintenance for all AC and EM equipment.
🔧
AC Servicing & Repair
Expert repair and rectification of chillers, ducted splits, package units, split units and cooling towers.
💡
Electrical Works
Complete electrical installations, wiring, distribution boards and power system solutions for all building types.
🚿
Plumbing
Water supply, drainage and sanitary systems for residential and commercial buildings to the highest standards.
🌬️
Duct Cleaning
Professional air duct cleaning services to improve indoor air quality, system efficiency and performance.
💧
Water Tank Cleaning
Professional water storage tank cleaning and disinfection in compliance with UAE health and safety regulations.
🏊
Pool Maintenance
Complete swimming pool servicing including chemical balancing, equipment maintenance and routine inspections.
🏗️
Fit-Out & Refurbishment
Complete interior fit-out and refurbishment works for commercial and residential spaces done to the finest standard.
🪟
Facade Cleaning
Professional external facade and glass cleaning for towers, hotels and commercial buildings across Abu Dhabi.
